app.noToolContext: No tool context was provided yet. Waiting for the host to open a tool.
app.toolNotFound: Tool UI for "{{toolName}}" was not found.

helloWorld.title: Hello World
helloWorld.description: A single example tool that shows the full MCP flow without turning the repository into a multi-demo showcase.

summary.singleTool: One tool is easier to understand, easier to fork, and easier to replace with your real feature.
summary.shadcn: The UI still uses shadcn-style building blocks, so the starter keeps the design system you want.
summary.microManifest: The micro-manifest architecture stays in place, so adding a second tool later is still a local change.

server.title: Server roundtrip
server.description: Run the only tool in the starter and validate its payload in the UI before rendering anything.
server.hint: The server validates input with Zod and returns neutral JSON so the UI can localize the final wording.
server.error: The tool execution failed. Check the host logs or the server response.
server.invalidResponse: The tool returned a shape the UI does not understand yet. Adjust the shared contract before adding more UI.

result.title: Latest result
result.empty: Invoke the tool to inspect the starter payload.

host.title: Host actions
host.description: These actions keep the starter practical without splitting the example into multiple demo tools.
host.footer: Keep or remove these buttons depending on how much host integration your real app needs.
host.appMissing: The host bridge is not ready yet.
host.docsSuccess: Requested the host to open the MCP docs.
host.messageBody: The hello-world starter is ready for {{name}}.

context.title: Current host context
context.description: Useful when a teammate wants to understand which values the host injects into the app.

nextSteps.title: Where to customize first
nextSteps.description: These are the first files to touch when you turn this starter into a real product.
